Class JavaType

java.lang.Object
uno.anahata.asi.nb.tools.java.JavaType
Direct Known Subclasses:
JavaMember
public class JavaType extends Object
A lightweight, serializable "keychain" DTO that uniquely identifies a Java type. It holds an ElementHandle, the fully qualified name, and a URL to the class file.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    private String
    fqn
    The fully qualified name of the type (e.g., java.lang.String).
    private org.netbeans.api.java.source.ElementHandle
    handle
    The NetBeans ElementHandle providing a unique, resolvable identity for the type.
    private URL
    url
    The URL pointing to the class file or source file for this type.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    JavaType(org.netbeans.api.java.source.ElementHandle<? extends TypeElement> handle, URL url)
    Constructs a new JavaType from an ElementHandle and a URL.
    JavaType(org.netbeans.modules.java.source.ui.JavaTypeDescription descriptor)
    Constructs a new JavaType from a JavaTypeDescription object from the Ctrl+O Go-To Type GUI.

    Description

    Resolves the URL back to a FileObject representing the class file.
    JavaTypeDocs

    Gets the Javadoc for this type.
    List<JavaMember>
    getMembers()
    Gets the members of this type using a universal, ClassIndex-based approach.
    JavaTypeSource

    Gets the source information for this type.

  • Field Details

    • handle

      private org.netbeans.api.java.source.ElementHandle handle
      The NetBeans ElementHandle providing a unique, resolvable identity for the type.

    • fqn

      private String fqn
      The fully qualified name of the type (e.g., java.lang.String).

    • url

      private URL url
      The URL pointing to the class file or source file for this type.

  • Constructor Details

    • JavaType

      public JavaType(org.netbeans.api.java.source.ElementHandle<? extends TypeElement> handle, URL url)
      Constructs a new JavaType from an ElementHandle and a URL.
      Parameters:
      handle - the element handle.
      url - the class file URL.

    • JavaType

      public JavaType(org.netbeans.modules.java.source.ui.JavaTypeDescription descriptor)
      Constructs a new JavaType from a JavaTypeDescription object from the Ctrl+O Go-To Type GUI.
      Parameters:
      descriptor - the type descriptor.

  • Method Details

    • getClassFileObject

      public org.openide.filesystems.FileObject getClassFileObject() throws Exception
      Resolves the URL back to a FileObject representing the class file.
      Returns:
      the FileObject for the class file.
      Throws:
      Exception - if the URL cannot be resolved.

    • getSource

      public JavaTypeSource getSource() throws Exception
      Gets the source information for this type.
      Returns:
      a JavaTypeSource object.
      Throws:
      Exception - if the source cannot be found.

    • getJavadoc

      public JavaTypeDocs getJavadoc() throws Exception
      Gets the Javadoc for this type.
      Returns:
      a JavaTypeDocs object.
      Throws:
      Exception - if the Javadoc cannot be retrieved.

    • getMembers

      public List<JavaMember> getMembers() throws Exception
      Gets the members of this type using a universal, ClassIndex-based approach.
      Returns:
      An unmodifiable list of JavaMembers.
      Throws:
      Exception - if the members cannot be retrieved.
